# HarvestAI

> AI-powered web scraping, lead generation, and B2B data extraction tool for Nigerian and African businesses.

HarvestAI lets businesses extract structured data from any website — leads, contact information, product prices, competitor data, SERP rankings, and more. No coding required.

## Core features

- **Lead generation** (`leads` mode): Extract business leads from directories, LinkedIn, and business listing sites
- **Data extraction** (`extract` mode): Pull structured data from any URL into clean JSON/CSV
- **Bulk processing** (`bulk_csv` mode): Upload a CSV of URLs and process them all at once
- **SERP scraping** (`serp` mode): Track keyword rankings on Google search results
- **Sitemap crawling** (`sitemap` mode): Map and extract all pages from any website
- **Email finder** (`email_finder` mode): Find business email addresses from company names or domains
- **Price monitoring** (`price_check` mode): Track competitor product prices over time
- **Data enrichment** (`enrich` mode): Append missing data to your existing contact lists

## Use cases

- Building prospect lists for cold outreach
- Monitoring competitor pricing on Nigerian e-commerce sites
- Finding supplier and distributor contacts
- Tracking your SEO keyword rankings
- Extracting data from Nigerian business directories (CAC, Ngcareers, VConnect)

## Pricing

Free tier available. Paid plans for higher volume extraction.

## Built for

Nigerian and African B2B sales teams, digital marketers, data analysts, and agencies that need structured web data without hiring developers.
